channel.title: Colada on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Colada on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: What Is a Cuban Coffee? Cafecito, Cortadito, Colada & Café Con Leche Explained
item.description: Cuban coffee is a family of small, sweet espresso drinks built on cafecito (café cubano) — a sugar-whipped espresso topped with tan espumita foam. Learn what cuban coffee is, the difference between cafecito, cortadito, colada, and Cuban café con leche, where the drink came from, the espumita technique, plus caffeine, calories, brand recommendations, and how to order one in Miami, Tampa, or Havana.
